queries.name: official_mcp_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server" OR "Model Context Protocol") (launch OR launched OR shipping OR shipped OR released OR "now live" OR beta OR GA OR "public beta") (official OR company OR startup OR team OR founder OR product) (site: OR github OR npm OR docs OR API) -filter:replies

queries.name: mcp_product_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server") (launch OR launched OR released OR shipping OR shipped OR "now live") (company OR startup OR founder OR product) (github OR docs OR API OR "try it") -filter:replies

queries.name: claude_code_plugin_launches
queries.query: ("Claude Code" OR claudecode) (plugin OR skill OR skills OR marketplace) (launch OR launched OR shipped OR released OR available OR "now live") (company OR startup OR founder OR product OR team) -filter:replies

queries.name: claude_code_plugin_official_accounts
queries.query: ("Claude Code" plugin OR "Claude Code" skill OR "Claude Code" marketplace) (official OR company OR startup OR founder OR product) (github OR docs OR install OR "Anthropic marketplace") -filter:replies

queries.name: cross_host_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin OR extension) (Claude Code OR Cursor OR Codex OR OpenCode OR Gemini OR Copilot) (launch OR launched OR shipped OR released OR available) -filter:replies

queries.name: one_host_first_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin) (Cursor OR Codex OR "Claude Code" OR Claude Desktop) ("now live" OR launched OR shipped OR released) (founder OR startup OR company OR product) -filter:replies

queries.name: plugin_portability_and_packaging
queries.query: (plugin OR skills OR extension OR MCP) (Claude Code OR Cursor OR Codex OR OpenCode) (packaging OR portability OR install OR auth OR manifest OR hooks OR sync OR rollout) -filter:replies

queries.name: mcp_distribution_and_growth
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server" OR plugin) (distribution OR adoption OR customers OR users OR pricing OR monetize OR monetization OR GTM OR revenue) (founder OR startup OR team OR company) -filter:replies

queries.name: platform_rollout_and_auth
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin OR agent) (auth OR OAuth OR rollout OR governance OR policy OR install OR packaging OR hooks OR portability) (Claude OR Cursor OR Codex OR enterprise OR platform) -filter:replies
